c1.texto_completo:
Report: Pre Professional/ Professional Practice
Facultad de Ingeniería y Ciencias Aplicadas,
Universidad de los Andes
Estefania Alexandra Soto Sandoval
4to
Falabella Financiero.
CMR puntos is a loyalty program of the falabella group, which regards customer loyalty with
exclusive benefits and discounts across various stores within the group.
Abstract
Falabella Financiero, a key component of the Falabella conglomerate, a leader in the Latin American
retail sector, houses the CMR Puntos loyalty program, essential for strengthening customer
relationships. During my internship, I contributed to the generation of strategic indicators,
validation of results, and creation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, including the Panel
360. I faced initial challenges in understanding the loyalty program and errors in data validation,
overcome with additional training and stricter quality controls. My contribution improved operational
efficiency and informed decision-making in the organization. The experience was an opportunity for
professional and personal growth, strengthening both technical and soft skills, preparing me for
future challenges with confidence.
1

1. Introduction
1.1 Company Description
Falabella Financiero is a key division within the Falabella conglomerate, a leader in the Latin
American retail sector. With a history dating back decades, Falabella has evolved to become one of
the most influential companies in the region. Falabella Financiero, in particular, has played a crucial
role in offering a wide range of financial services and loyalty programs to its customers.
Within Falabella Financiero, there is CMR Puntos, a strategic loyalty program that seeks to
strengthen the relationship with customers and reward their loyalty. CMR Puntos operates under the
premise of offering exclusive benefits, discounts and rewards to Falabella's customers, thus
encouraging purchase frequency and active participation in Falabella's ecosystem.
Quantitative Aspects:
Number
of
Employees: Falabella Financiero has a team of highly trained and committed
professionals working in various areas such as operations, marketing, data analysis, technology and
more.
Revenues: Falabella Financiero's revenues come from a variety of sources, including fees for
financial services, interest on credit products, and sales associated with the CMR Puntos loyalty
program.
Organizational Structure: Falabella Financiero has a solid and efficient organizational structure, with
different functional areas that work in synergy to achieve the established commercial and financial
objectives. This includes areas such as operations, finance, technology, marketing and customer
service.
Relationship between the different areas of the organization:
The relationship between the different areas of Falabella Financiero is fundamental to the success
of the business. There is fluid communication and collaboration between departments, which allows
for efficient execution of strategies and delivery of high quality services to customers. For example,
the operations team works closely with the Data Factory team to ensure the operability and security
of the CMR Puntos systems, while the marketing team collaborates with the data analytics team to
develop effective and personalized campaigns for clients.
2

1.2 Department/Area Description
The CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero is fundamental to the management and
development of the Falabella Group's loyalty program. This department is responsible for designing,
implementing and managing strategies to strengthen the relationship with customers and reward
their loyalty through the CMR Puntos program.
Activities Performed:
●
Within the CMR Puntos area, my main responsibilities included:
●
Generation and calculation of strategic loyalty indicators from new data entities available.
●
Validation of results obtained through data analysis and verification techniques.
●
Generation of reports and dashboards for the presentation of results and trend analysis.
●
In addition to these tasks, my supervisor and her boss provided me with additional
challenges to evaluate my progress and skills during my internship.
Relationship with other areas:
The relationship with other areas within Falabella Financiero is close and collaborative. I worked in
coordination with teams in Chile, Peru and Colombia from operations, Product Manager of the
different stores, Data Factory and Marketing to ensure the coherence and effectiveness of the
strategies
implemented
in
the
CMR
Puntos
program.
Smooth
communication
and
cross-departmental collaboration were key to the success of our initiatives.
During my internship, my supervisor played a key role in my professional development. He was in
charge of teaching me the company's processes and procedures, training me properly and providing
me with all the necessary tools to perform my tasks successfully. In addition, my supervisor was
always available to provide me with guidance and support, both in work and personal aspects. His
boss was also actively involved in my training, providing me with additional challenges and
opportunities to grow within the area.
3

2. Work Details
2.1 General Activities
During my internship, I was involved in a variety of tasks within the CMR Points area, which
included:
Familiarization with Tools and Training: Initially, I spent time familiarizing myself with the tools
necessary to perform my tasks, such as GCP and Looker Studio. I received training both through
courses on platforms such as Udemy and Buk, as well as training sessions led by María Paula
Saavedra and Alejandra, who provided me with a solid understanding of how the CMR Puntos
loyalty program works.
Loyalty Indicator Generation and Calculation: A significant part of my work involved the generation
and calculation of strategic loyalty indicators using newly available data entities. This included
collaborating with Management Control and Operations teams to review issues and present updates
to the Data Unify project, which required weekly meetings to ensure consistency and project
progress.
Results Validation: I performed validation of results obtained by comparing current entity indicators
with results from new SQL queries in GCP. This activity included detailed analysis to understand and
address any significant discrepancies between the data.
Report and Dashboard Generation: I used Looker Studio to create reports and dashboards that
provided key information for decision making. This involved loading data from BigQuery and
designing effective visualizations, such as graphs and charts, so that the CMR Points team and
other relevant areas could understand and use the data efficiently. In addition, these dashboards
were also used to identify operational issues and support the marketing team in decision making.
During my time in the CMR Puntos area, I actively participated in a collaborative environment
involving multiple teams and areas within the organization. This involved a number of meaningful
interactions and working relationships that enriched my experience and contributed to the success
of the projects I was involved in.
I worked closely with colleagues from the Management Control and Operations team, where we
held weekly meetings to review issues, present updates and discuss strategies. This collaboration
was critical to ensure consistency and progress on the Data Unify project. In addition, I worked
closely with Alex Meza from Operations, who provided me with detailed training on the data flow
and operational processes related to the CMR Puntos loyalty program. This training gave me a
better understanding of how customer and redemption information was collected and processed,
which was essential to my work in generating strategic loyalty metrics.
In addition to collaborating with Management Control and Operations teams, I also had the
opportunity to interact with colleagues from areas such as Alliances and Projects. This interaction
was fundamental to understanding the interconnectedness of different parts of the organization and
how our activities in the CMR Puntos area related to other initiatives and projects within Falabella
Financiero. Working together, we were able to ensure the cohesion and success of our projects by
sharing knowledge and resources.
4

My internship also gave me the opportunity to interact with managers and product managers from
other areas, such as Loyalty and Alliances. These interactions were valuable to understand the
needs and objectives of other parts of the organization, as well as to contribute ideas and analysis
relevant to their operations. In addition, I received valuable input and feedback from Loyalty team
leaders such as Mathias Thoine and Diego Vidaurre, who played a key role in my professional
development by providing guidance and support in my work.
5

2.2 Most Challenge Activity
One of the most challenging activities during my internship in the CMR Puntos area was to
understand in depth how the loyalty program worked and to understand the importance of
calculating and using the strategic indicators. Although the calculation itself was relatively
straightforward, understanding the purpose of these indicators and their timing (calculated at 12
months, 3 months, 1 month) proved to be an initial challenge. In addition, debugging the
information to upload databases to BigQuery was also a complicated process at the beginning. This
lack of understanding hindered my ability to perform effective analysis and generate relevant
insights for decision making.
Another important challenge was to clean the information needed to upload databases to BigQuery,
the data warehousing platform used in the project. This task required a meticulous process of data
cleaning and preparation to ensure accuracy and consistency of the results. At first, I struggled to
master this task, but with time and practice, I was able to improve my data cleansing skills and
perform my tasks more efficiently.
In addition, I faced complexities in certain challenges and analyses that involved performing
customer openings and drawing conclusions from this data. These analyses were performed using
SQL queries, which required specific technical skills and knowledge to execute them efficiently.
Initially, I found it difficult to perform efficient queries and optimize the use of BigQuery to obtain
accurate and fast results.
To overcome these challenges, I sought help and guidance from my colleagues, especially Jousseff
and Tomas from the Operations team. They provided me with expert advice and taught me
advanced techniques for efficient use of BigQuery and SQL query optimization. In addition, I
worked closely with my supervisor Alejandra and her boss Maria Paula Saavedra, who provided me
with support and guidance throughout the process. Together, we reviewed my mistakes and
developed strategies to improve my understanding of the indicators and my ability to calculate
them effectively.
With time and practice, I managed to overcome these challenges and improve my skills in
understanding and calculating loyalty indicators at CMR Puntos. Through collaboration with my
colleagues and guidance from my supervisors, I was able to master data cleansing, perform
effective analysis and generate business-relevant insights. This process allowed me not only to
complete my tasks more efficiently, but also to contribute more significantly to the success of the
projects I was involved in.
The activity of understanding and calculating loyalty indicators at CMR Puntos represented a
significant challenge during my internship, but thanks to the collaboration with my colleagues and
the guidance of my supervisors, I was able to overcome these challenges and obtain positive
results. This process allowed me to develop important technical and professional skills, as well as
learn the importance of working as a team and seeking help when needed.
6

3. Analysis
3.1 Company Analysis
Falabella Financiero and its CMR Puntos loyalty program are key components of the Falabella
conglomerate, a leader in the Latin American retail sector. The following is a general analysis of the
organization, addressing relevant aspects such as productivity, capacity, employees, among others.
-
Productivity and Profitability:
Falabella Financiero has demonstrated solid productivity and profitability over the years, thanks to
its diversification of financial services and its focus on customer satisfaction. The CMR Puntos
loyalty program has been instrumental in strengthening customer relationships and increasing
participation in Falabella's ecosystem, which has contributed significantly to the company's overall
profitability.
-
Innovation Capacity:
Falabella
Financiero's
capacity
for
innovation is reflected in the continuous evolution and
improvement of its CMR Puntos loyalty program. The implementation of new technologies, such as
GCP
and
Looker
Studio,
for data analysis and reporting, demonstrates the organization's
commitment to innovation and operational excellence.
-
Human Resources and Talent:
Falabella Financiero has a team of highly skilled and committed professionals who play a critical role
in the company's success. The CMR Puntos loyalty program requires a combination of technical,
analytical and project management skills, and the organization has demonstrated an ability to
recruit and retain high-level talent in all relevant areas.
-
Interconnectedness with other areas of Falabella:
The interconnectedness of Falabella Financiero and CMR Puntos with other areas of the Falabella
conglomerate is key to its success. Collaboration with areas such as sales, logistics, and marketing
ensures effective integration of financial services and the loyalty program with operations,
maximizing value for customers and contributing to the company's overall growth.
7

-
Future Challenges and Opportunities:
Despite their strong performance, Falabella Financiero and CMR Puntos face future challenges and
opportunities. Competition in the financial and retail sector remains intense, requiring continued
innovation and adaptation to changing customer needs. In addition, international expansion and
digitalization are areas of potential growth that the organization can leverage to further strengthen
its market position.
Falabella Financiero and its CMR Puntos loyalty program are vital components of the Falabella
conglomerate's success. With strong productivity, innovation and human talent, the organization is
well positioned to meet future challenges and take advantage of growth opportunities in the Latin
American market. However, it is essential that the company remains vigilant to potential risks,
staying ahead of the curve in terms of technology and innovative projects, such as the Data Unify
system, that seek to move away from archaic methods. It is essential that it takes proactive
measures to ensure its long-term success and maintain its position as a leader in the Latin
American market.
3.2 Work Analysis
During my internship in the CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero, I played a key role in the
generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators, as well as in the validation of results and
the generation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, especially Panel 360. My work
contributed significantly to the area and the organization in several aspects:
Contribution to the Area:
●
Generation of Strategic Indicators: My participation in the generation and calculation of
strategic Loyalty indicators allowed the team to obtain valuable information on the
performance of the CMR Puntos program. These indicators, such as customer retention
rate,
purchase
frequency
and
customer
value,
were
fundamental
to evaluate the
effectiveness of the loyalty strategies and make informed decisions to improve the program.
●
Results Validation: I performed a thorough validation of the results obtained, comparing the
loyalty indicators generated with actual transaction data and customer behavior. This
validation ensured the accuracy and reliability of the reports and analysis presented to the
team.
●
Report and Dashboard Generation: Using Looker Studio, I created visually appealing and
easy-to-understand reports and dashboards, including the 360 Dashboard, which provided
a comprehensive view of the information needed for strategic decision-making. These
reports
were
used
by
various
departments,
including
marketing,
operations
and
management, to evaluate loyalty program performance and design future strategies.
Contribution to the Organization:
8

●
Improved Operational Efficiency: By automating the generation of indicators and reports, I
optimized the area's internal processes, allowing for greater operational efficiency and a
reduction in time spent on manual and repetitive tasks.
●
Informed Decision Making: The reports and analysis provided contributed to more informed
and strategic decision making throughout the organization. The availability of accurate and
up-to-date data enabled leaders to identify areas of opportunity and take corrective action
in a timely manner.
Mistakes Made and Suggestions for Improvement:
During my work, I faced some challenges and made mistakes that could have been minimized with
specific measures:
●
Initial Difficulties in Understanding the Loyalty Program: Initially, I had difficulty in fully
understanding the operation and purpose of the loyalty metrics. To minimize this problem in
the future, a more detailed training program on the loyalty program and its key metrics
could be implemented for new employees.
●
Errors in Data Validation: On a few occasions, I made mistakes in validating the results
obtained, which affected the accuracy of the reports. To avoid these errors, tighter quality
controls and automated validation processes could be implemented to ensure data
accuracy.
●
Query and Process Optimization: During the reporting process, I faced challenges in
optimizing SQL queries and data extraction processes. To improve this aspect, additional
training in SQL and query optimization could be invested in, as well as the implementation
of more advanced data analysis tools.
During my internship in the CMR Puntos area of Falabella Financiero, I played a crucial role in the
generation of strategic indicators, the validation of results and the creation of reports through
dashboards in Looker Studio, including Panel 360. My work contributed significantly to the area and
the organization by providing valuable information for decision making and improving operational
efficiency.
Although I made significant progress, I faced challenges such as initial understanding of the loyalty
program and errors in data validation. To minimize these errors in the future, measures such as
more detailed training and stricter quality controls could be implemented.
9

4. Personal Reflection
During my time at CMR Puntos de Falabella Financiero, I experienced a journey of learning and
growth that transcended mere job responsibilities. My contribution to the team was not only
focused on executing tasks and delivering results, but also encompassed a profound process of
self-discovery and personal development.
On a professional level, every day represented a new and exciting challenge. From mastering
technical tools to understanding complex data systems, I was immersed in a constant learning
environment. Each task performed, whether it was generating strategic indicators or validating
results, provided me with the opportunity to hone my skills and expand my knowledge in key areas
for data analysis and informed decision making.
However, beyond the technical skills acquired, it was the interaction with my team and other
departments that truly enriched my experience.
Close collaboration with experienced colleagues allowed me not only to absorb their knowledge and
experience, but also to develop soft skills such as effective communication, time management and
conflict resolution.
These human interactions contributed greatly to my growth as a professional, allowing me to
understand the importance of teamwork and synergy in a work environment.
On a more personal level, this experience challenged me to step out of my comfort zone and to
embrace uncertainty with courage. I learned to face obstacles with determination and resilience,
turning moments of adversity into opportunities for learning and growth. The ability to adapt to
changing situations and maintain a positive mindset became an invaluable asset not only in the
workplace, but also in my daily life.
Ultimately, my time at CMR Puntos was not only an opportunity to contribute to the success of the
team and the organization, but also an experience of self-discovery and personal growth.
I took with me not only technical skills and expertise, but also profound lessons on the importance
of teamwork, resilience and continuous development. This internship has left an indelible mark on
my professional and personal journey, preparing me for future challenges with confidence and
determination.
10

competencias_activas.nombre: Utiliza conocimientos y metodologías de ciencias básicas y ciencias de la ingeniería
competencias_activas.descripcion: Utiliza conocimientos y metodologías de ciencias básicas y ciencias de la ingeniería, formulando problemas de ingeniería que combinan la teoría y la práctica en su solución.

competencias_activas.nombre: Aplica las técnicas y métodos de las ciencias de la ingeniería a la resolución de problemas fundamentales
competencias_activas.descripcion: Aplica las técnicas y métodos de las ciencias de la ingeniería a la resolución de problemas fundamentales, utilizando nuevas tecnologías y tomando en cuenta los supuestos y limitaciones teóricas y prácticas.
Integra eficazmente equipos de trabajo, estableciendo metas, planificando tareas y cumpliendo objetivos en los plazos requeridos.

competencias_activas.nombre: Se comunica por escrito y oralmente de forma efectiva tanto en español como en inglés
competencias_activas.descripcion: Se comunica por escrito y oralmente de forma efectiva tanto en español como en inglés, especialmente en temas relativos a su profesión.

future challenges with confidence.

work_analysis.texto:
3.2 Work Analysis
During my internship in the CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero, I played a key role in the
generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators, as well as in the validation of results and
the generation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, especially Panel 360. My work
contributed significantly to the area and the organization in several aspects:
Contribution to the Area:
●
Generation of Strategic Indicators: My participation in the generation and calculation of
strategic Loyalty indicators allowed the team to obtain valuable information on the
performance of the CMR Puntos program. These indicators, such as customer retention
rate,
purchase
frequency
and
customer
value,
were
fundamental
to evaluate the
effectiveness of the loyalty strategies and make informed decisions to improve the program.
●
Results Validation: I performed a thorough validation of the results obtained, comparing the
loyalty indicators generated with actual transaction data and customer behavior. This
validation ensured the accuracy and reliability of the reports and analysis presented to the
team.
●
Report and Dashboard Generation: Using Looker Studio, I created visually appealing and
easy-to-understand reports and dashboards, including the 360 Dashboard, which provided
a comprehensive view of the information needed for strategic decision-making. These
reports
were
used
by
various
departments,
including
marketing,
operations
and
management, to evaluate loyalty program performance and design future strategies.
Contribution to the Organization:
8

●
Improved Operational Efficiency: By automating the generation of indicators and reports, I
optimized the area's internal processes, allowing for greater operational efficiency and a
reduction in time spent on manual and repetitive tasks.
●
Informed Decision Making: The reports and analysis provided contributed to more informed
and strategic decision making throughout the organization. The availability of accurate and
up-to-date data enabled leaders to identify areas of opportunity and take corrective action
in a timely manner.
Mistakes Made and Suggestions for Improvement:
During my work, I faced some challenges and made mistakes that could have been minimized with
specific measures:
●
Initial Difficulties in Understanding the Loyalty Program: Initially, I had difficulty in fully
understanding the operation and purpose of the loyalty metrics. To minimize this problem in
the future, a more detailed training program on the loyalty program and its key metrics
could be implemented for new employees.
●
Errors in Data Validation: On a few occasions, I made mistakes in validating the results
obtained, which affected the accuracy of the reports. To avoid these errors, tighter quality
controls and automated validation processes could be implemented to ensure data
accuracy.
●
Query and Process Optimization: During the reporting process, I faced challenges in
optimizing SQL queries and data extraction processes. To improve this aspect, additional
training in SQL and query optimization could be invested in, as well as the implementation
of more advanced data analysis tools.
During my internship in the CMR Puntos area of Falabella Financiero, I played a crucial role in the
generation of strategic indicators, the validation of results and the creation of reports through
dashboards in Looker Studio, including Panel 360. My work contributed significantly to the area and
the organization by providing valuable information for decision making and improving operational
efficiency.
Although I made significant progress, I faced challenges such as initial understanding of the loyalty
program and errors in data validation. To minimize these errors in the future, measures such as
more detailed training and stricter quality controls could be implemented.
9

4.

personal_reflection.texto:
Personal Reflection
During my time at CMR Puntos de Falabella Financiero, I experienced a journey of learning and
growth that transcended mere job responsibilities. My contribution to the team was not only
focused on executing tasks and delivering results, but also encompassed a profound process of
self-discovery and personal development.
On a professional level, every day represented a new and exciting challenge. From mastering
technical tools to understanding complex data systems, I was immersed in a constant learning
environment. Each task performed, whether it was generating strategic indicators or validating
results, provided me with the opportunity to hone my skills and expand my knowledge in key areas
for data analysis and informed decision making.
However, beyond the technical skills acquired, it was the interaction with my team and other
departments that truly enriched my experience.
Close collaboration with experienced colleagues allowed me not only to absorb their knowledge and
experience, but also to develop soft skills such as effective communication, time management and
conflict resolution.
These human interactions contributed greatly to my growth as a professional, allowing me to
understand the importance of teamwork and synergy in a work environment.
On a more personal level, this experience challenged me to step out of my comfort zone and to
embrace uncertainty with courage. I learned to face obstacles with determination and resilience,
turning moments of adversity into opportunities for learning and growth. The ability to adapt to
changing situations and maintain a positive mindset became an invaluable asset not only in the
workplace, but also in my daily life.
Ultimately, my time at CMR Puntos was not only an opportunity to contribute to the success of the
team and the organization, but also an experience of self-discovery and personal growth.
I took with me not only technical skills and expertise, but also profound lessons on the importance
of teamwork, resilience and continuous development. This internship has left an indelible mark on
my professional and personal journey, preparing me for future challenges with confidence and
determination.
10

chunks.texto: Abstract Falabella Financiero, a key component of the Falabella conglomerate, a leader in the Latin American retail sector, houses the CMR Puntos loyalty program, essential for strengthening customer relationships. During my internship, I contributed to the generation of strategic indicators, validation of results, and creation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, including the Panel 360.

I faced initial challenges in understanding the loyalty program and errors in data validation, overcome with additional training and stricter quality controls. My contribution improved operational efficiency and informed decision-making in the organization. The experience was an opportunity for professional and personal growth, strengthening both technical and soft skills, preparing me for future challenges with confidence. 1  1. Introduction.

1.1 Company Description Falabella Financiero is a key division within the Falabella conglomerate, a leader in the Latin American retail sector. With a history dating back decades, Falabella has evolved to become one of the most influential companies in the region. Falabella Financiero, in particular, has played a crucial role in offering a wide range of financial services and loyalty programs to its customers.

Within Falabella Financiero, there is CMR Puntos, a strategic loyalty program that seeks to strengthen the relationship with customers and reward their loyalty. CMR Puntos operates under the premise of offering exclusive benefits, discounts and rewards to Falabella's customers, thus encouraging purchase frequency and active participation in Falabella's ecosystem.

Quantitative Aspects: Number of Employees: Falabella Financiero has a team of highly trained and committed professionals working in various areas such as operations, marketing, data analysis, technology and more. Revenues: Falabella Financiero's revenues come from a variety of sources, including fees for financial services, interest on credit products, and sales associated with the CMR Puntos loyalty program.

Organizational Structure: Falabella Financiero has a solid and efficient organizational structure, with different functional areas that work in synergy to achieve the established commercial and financial objectives. This includes areas such as operations, finance, technology, marketing and customer service. Relationship between the different areas of the organization: The relationship between the different areas of Falabella Financiero is fundamental to the success of the business.

There is fluid communication and collaboration between departments, which allows for efficient execution of strategies and delivery of high quality services to customers. For example, the operations team works closely with the Data Factory team to ensure the operability and security of the CMR Puntos systems, while the marketing team collaborates with the data analytics team to develop effective and personalized campaigns for clients. 2.

1.2 Department/Area Description The CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero is fundamental to the management and development of the Falabella Group's loyalty program. This department is responsible for designing, implementing and managing strategies to strengthen the relationship with customers and reward their loyalty through the CMR Puntos program.

Activities Performed: ● Within the CMR Puntos area, my main responsibilities included: ● Generation and calculation of strategic loyalty indicators from new data entities available. ● Validation of results obtained through data analysis and verification techniques. ● Generation of reports and dashboards for the presentation of results and trend analysis.

● In addition to these tasks, my supervisor and her boss provided me with additional challenges to evaluate my progress and skills during my internship. Relationship with other areas: The relationship with other areas within Falabella Financiero is close and collaborative.

I worked in coordination with teams in Chile, Peru and Colombia from operations, Product Manager of the different stores, Data Factory and Marketing to ensure the coherence and effectiveness of the strategies implemented in the CMR Puntos program. Smooth communication and cross-departmental collaboration were key to the success of our initiatives. During my internship, my supervisor played a key role in my professional development.

He was in charge of teaching me the company's processes and procedures, training me properly and providing me with all the necessary tools to perform my tasks successfully. In addition, my supervisor was always available to provide me with guidance and support, both in work and personal aspects. His boss was also actively involved in my training, providing me with additional challenges and opportunities to grow within the area. 3  2. Work Details.

2.1 General Activities During my internship, I was involved in a variety of tasks within the CMR Points area, which included: Familiarization with Tools and Training: Initially, I spent time familiarizing myself with the tools necessary to perform my tasks, such as GCP and Looker Studio.

I received training both through courses on platforms such as Udemy and Buk, as well as training sessions led by María Paula Saavedra and Alejandra, who provided me with a solid understanding of how the CMR Puntos loyalty program works. Loyalty Indicator Generation and Calculation: A significant part of my work involved the generation and calculation of strategic loyalty indicators using newly available data entities.

This included collaborating with Management Control and Operations teams to review issues and present updates to the Data Unify project, which required weekly meetings to ensure consistency and project progress. Results Validation: I performed validation of results obtained by comparing current entity indicators with results from new SQL queries in GCP. This activity included detailed analysis to understand and address any significant discrepancies between the data.

Report and Dashboard Generation: I used Looker Studio to create reports and dashboards that provided key information for decision making. This involved loading data from BigQuery and designing effective visualizations, such as graphs and charts, so that the CMR Points team and other relevant areas could understand and use the data efficiently. In addition, these dashboards were also used to identify operational issues and support the marketing team in decision making.

During my time in the CMR Puntos area, I actively participated in a collaborative environment involving multiple teams and areas within the organization. This involved a number of meaningful interactions and working relationships that enriched my experience and contributed to the success of the projects I was involved in. I worked closely with colleagues from the Management Control and Operations team, where we held weekly meetings to review issues, present updates and discuss strategies.

This collaboration was critical to ensure consistency and progress on the Data Unify project. In addition, I worked closely with Alex Meza from Operations, who provided me with detailed training on the data flow and operational processes related to the CMR Puntos loyalty program. This training gave me a better understanding of how customer and redemption information was collected and processed, which was essential to my work in generating strategic loyalty metrics.

In addition to collaborating with Management Control and Operations teams, I also had the opportunity to interact with colleagues from areas such as Alliances and Projects. This interaction was fundamental to understanding the interconnectedness of different parts of the organization and how our activities in the CMR Puntos area related to other initiatives and projects within Falabella Financiero.

Working together, we were able to ensure the cohesion and success of our projects by sharing knowledge and resources. 4  My internship also gave me the opportunity to interact with managers and product managers from other areas, such as Loyalty and Alliances. These interactions were valuable to understand the needs and objectives of other parts of the organization, as well as to contribute ideas and analysis relevant to their operations.

In addition, I received valuable input and feedback from Loyalty team leaders such as Mathias Thoine and Diego Vidaurre, who played a key role in my professional development by providing guidance and support in my work. 5.

2.2 Most Challenge Activity One of the most challenging activities during my internship in the CMR Puntos area was to understand in depth how the loyalty program worked and to understand the importance of calculating and using the strategic indicators. Although the calculation itself was relatively straightforward, understanding the purpose of these indicators and their timing (calculated at 12 months, 3 months, 1 month) proved to be an initial challenge.

In addition, debugging the information to upload databases to BigQuery was also a complicated process at the beginning. This lack of understanding hindered my ability to perform effective analysis and generate relevant insights for decision making. Another important challenge was to clean the information needed to upload databases to BigQuery, the data warehousing platform used in the project.

This task required a meticulous process of data cleaning and preparation to ensure accuracy and consistency of the results. At first, I struggled to master this task, but with time and practice, I was able to improve my data cleansing skills and perform my tasks more efficiently. In addition, I faced complexities in certain challenges and analyses that involved performing customer openings and drawing conclusions from this data.

These analyses were performed using SQL queries, which required specific technical skills and knowledge to execute them efficiently. Initially, I found it difficult to perform efficient queries and optimize the use of BigQuery to obtain accurate and fast results. To overcome these challenges, I sought help and guidance from my colleagues, especially Jousseff and Tomas from the Operations team.

They provided me with expert advice and taught me advanced techniques for efficient use of BigQuery and SQL query optimization. In addition, I worked closely with my supervisor Alejandra and her boss Maria Paula Saavedra, who provided me with support and guidance throughout the process. Together, we reviewed my mistakes and developed strategies to improve my understanding of the indicators and my ability to calculate them effectively.

With time and practice, I managed to overcome these challenges and improve my skills in understanding and calculating loyalty indicators at CMR Puntos. Through collaboration with my colleagues and guidance from my supervisors, I was able to master data cleansing, perform effective analysis and generate business-relevant insights. This process allowed me not only to complete my tasks more efficiently, but also to contribute more significantly to the success of the projects I was involved in.

The activity of understanding and calculating loyalty indicators at CMR Puntos represented a significant challenge during my internship, but thanks to the collaboration with my colleagues and the guidance of my supervisors, I was able to overcome these challenges and obtain positive results. This process allowed me to develop important technical and professional skills, as well as learn the importance of working as a team and seeking help when needed. 6  3. Analysis.

3.1 Company Analysis Falabella Financiero and its CMR Puntos loyalty program are key components of the Falabella conglomerate, a leader in the Latin American retail sector. The following is a general analysis of the organization, addressing relevant aspects such as productivity, capacity, employees, among others.

- Productivity and Profitability: Falabella Financiero has demonstrated solid productivity and profitability over the years, thanks to its diversification of financial services and its focus on customer satisfaction. The CMR Puntos loyalty program has been instrumental in strengthening customer relationships and increasing participation in Falabella's ecosystem, which has contributed significantly to the company's overall profitability.

- Innovation Capacity: Falabella Financiero's capacity for innovation is reflected in the continuous evolution and improvement of its CMR Puntos loyalty program. The implementation of new technologies, such as GCP and Looker Studio, for data analysis and reporting, demonstrates the organization's commitment to innovation and operational excellence.

- Human Resources and Talent: Falabella Financiero has a team of highly skilled and committed professionals who play a critical role in the company's success. The CMR Puntos loyalty program requires a combination of technical, analytical and project management skills, and the organization has demonstrated an ability to recruit and retain high-level talent in all relevant areas.

- Interconnectedness with other areas of Falabella: The interconnectedness of Falabella Financiero and CMR Puntos with other areas of the Falabella conglomerate is key to its success. Collaboration with areas such as sales, logistics, and marketing ensures effective integration of financial services and the loyalty program with operations, maximizing value for customers and contributing to the company's overall growth.

7  - Future Challenges and Opportunities: Despite their strong performance, Falabella Financiero and CMR Puntos face future challenges and opportunities. Competition in the financial and retail sector remains intense, requiring continued innovation and adaptation to changing customer needs. In addition, international expansion and digitalization are areas of potential growth that the organization can leverage to further strengthen its market position.

Falabella Financiero and its CMR Puntos loyalty program are vital components of the Falabella conglomerate's success. With strong productivity, innovation and human talent, the organization is well positioned to meet future challenges and take advantage of growth opportunities in the Latin American market.

However, it is essential that the company remains vigilant to potential risks, staying ahead of the curve in terms of technology and innovative projects, such as the Data Unify system, that seek to move away from archaic methods. It is essential that it takes proactive measures to ensure its long-term success and maintain its position as a leader in the Latin American market.

3.2 Work Analysis During my internship in the CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero, I played a key role in the generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators, as well as in the validation of results and the generation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, especially Panel 360.

My work contributed significantly to the area and the organization in several aspects: Contribution to the Area: ● Generation of Strategic Indicators: My participation in the generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators allowed the team to obtain valuable information on the performance of the CMR Puntos program.

These indicators, such as customer retention rate, purchase frequency and customer value, were fundamental to evaluate the effectiveness of the loyalty strategies and make informed decisions to improve the program. ● Results Validation: I performed a thorough validation of the results obtained, comparing the loyalty indicators generated with actual transaction data and customer behavior. This validation ensured the accuracy and reliability of the reports and analysis presented to the team.

● Report and Dashboard Generation: Using Looker Studio, I created visually appealing and easy-to-understand reports and dashboards, including the 360 Dashboard, which provided a comprehensive view of the information needed for strategic decision-making. These reports were used by various departments, including marketing, operations and management, to evaluate loyalty program performance and design future strategies.

Contribution to the Organization: 8  ● Improved Operational Efficiency: By automating the generation of indicators and reports, I optimized the area's internal processes, allowing for greater operational efficiency and a reduction in time spent on manual and repetitive tasks. ● Informed Decision Making: The reports and analysis provided contributed to more informed and strategic decision making throughout the organization.

The availability of accurate and up-to-date data enabled leaders to identify areas of opportunity and take corrective action in a timely manner. Mistakes Made and Suggestions for Improvement: During my work, I faced some challenges and made mistakes that could have been minimized with specific measures: ● Initial Difficulties in Understanding the Loyalty Program: Initially, I had difficulty in fully understanding the operation and purpose of the loyalty metrics.

To minimize this problem in the future, a more detailed training program on the loyalty program and its key metrics could be implemented for new employees. ● Errors in Data Validation: On a few occasions, I made mistakes in validating the results obtained, which affected the accuracy of the reports. To avoid these errors, tighter quality controls and automated validation processes could be implemented to ensure data accuracy.

● Query and Process Optimization: During the reporting process, I faced challenges in optimizing SQL queries and data extraction processes. To improve this aspect, additional training in SQL and query optimization could be invested in, as well as the implementation of more advanced data analysis tools.

During my internship in the CMR Puntos area of Falabella Financiero, I played a crucial role in the generation of strategic indicators, the validation of results and the creation of reports through dashboards in Looker Studio, including Panel 360. My work contributed significantly to the area and the organization by providing valuable information for decision making and improving operational efficiency.

Although I made significant progress, I faced challenges such as initial understanding of the loyalty program and errors in data validation. To minimize these errors in the future, measures such as more detailed training and stricter quality controls could be implemented. 9  4.

Personal Reflection During my time at CMR Puntos de Falabella Financiero, I experienced a journey of learning and growth that transcended mere job responsibilities. My contribution to the team was not only focused on executing tasks and delivering results, but also encompassed a profound process of self-discovery and personal development. On a professional level, every day represented a new and exciting challenge.

From mastering technical tools to understanding complex data systems, I was immersed in a constant learning environment. Each task performed, whether it was generating strategic indicators or validating results, provided me with the opportunity to hone my skills and expand my knowledge in key areas for data analysis and informed decision making. However, beyond the technical skills acquired, it was the interaction with my team and other departments that truly enriched my experience.

Close collaboration with experienced colleagues allowed me not only to absorb their knowledge and experience, but also to develop soft skills such as effective communication, time management and conflict resolution. These human interactions contributed greatly to my growth as a professional, allowing me to understand the importance of teamwork and synergy in a work environment.

On a more personal level, this experience challenged me to step out of my comfort zone and to embrace uncertainty with courage. I learned to face obstacles with determination and resilience, turning moments of adversity into opportunities for learning and growth. The ability to adapt to changing situations and maintain a positive mindset became an invaluable asset not only in the workplace, but also in my daily life.

Ultimately, my time at CMR Puntos was not only an opportunity to contribute to the success of the team and the organization, but also an experience of self-discovery and personal growth. I took with me not only technical skills and expertise, but also profound lessons on the importance of teamwork, resilience and continuous development. This internship has left an indelible mark on my professional and personal journey, preparing me for future challenges with confidence and determination. 10.

In addition, international expansion and digitalization are areas of potential growth that the organization can leverage to further strengthen its market position.

Falabella Financiero and its CMR Puntos loyalty program are vital components of the Falabella conglomerate's success. With strong productivity, innovation and human talent, the organization is well positioned to meet future challenges and take advantage of growth opportunities in the Latin American market.

However, it is essential that the company remains vigilant to potential risks, staying ahead of the curve in terms of technology and innovative projects, such as the Data Unify system, that seek to move away from archaic methods. It is essential that it takes proactive measures to ensure its long-term success and maintain its position as a leader in the Latin American market.

3.2 Work Analysis During my internship in the CMR Puntos area within Falabella Financiero, I played a key role in the generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators, as well as in the validation of results and the generation of reports through panels in Looker Studio, especially Panel 360.

My work contributed significantly to the area and the organization in several aspects: Contribution to the Area: ● Generation of Strategic Indicators: My participation in the generation and calculation of strategic Loyalty indicators allowed the team to obtain valuable information on the performance of the CMR Puntos program.

These indicators, such as customer retention rate, purchase frequency and customer value, were fundamental to evaluate the effectiveness of the loyalty strategies and make informed decisions to improve the program. ● Results Validation: I performed a thorough validation of the results obtained, comparing the loyalty indicators generated with actual transaction data and customer behavior. This validation ensured the accuracy and reliability of the reports and analysis presented to the team.

● Report and Dashboard Generation: Using Looker Studio, I created visually appealing and easy-to-understand reports and dashboards, including the 360 Dashboard, which provided a comprehensive view of the information needed for strategic decision-making. These reports were used by various departments, including marketing, operations and management, to evaluate loyalty program performance and design future strategies.

Contribution to the Organization: 8  ● Improved Operational Efficiency: By automating the generation of indicators and reports, I optimized the area's internal processes, allowing for greater operational efficiency and a reduction in time spent on manual and repetitive tasks. ● Informed Decision Making: The reports and analysis provided contributed to more informed and strategic decision making throughout the organization.

The availability of accurate and up-to-date data enabled leaders to identify areas of opportunity and take corrective action in a timely manner. Mistakes Made and Suggestions for Improvement: During my work, I faced some challenges and made mistakes that could have been minimized with specific measures: ● Initial Difficulties in Understanding the Loyalty Program: Initially, I had difficulty in fully understanding the operation and purpose of the loyalty metrics.

To minimize this problem in the future, a more detailed training program on the loyalty program and its key metrics could be implemented for new employees. ● Errors in Data Validation: On a few occasions, I made mistakes in validating the results obtained, which affected the accuracy of the reports. To avoid these errors, tighter quality controls and automated validation processes could be implemented to ensure data accuracy.

● Query and Process Optimization: During the reporting process, I faced challenges in optimizing SQL queries and data extraction processes. To improve this aspect, additional training in SQL and query optimization could be invested in, as well as the implementation of more advanced data analysis tools.

During my internship in the CMR Puntos area of Falabella Financiero, I played a crucial role in the generation of strategic indicators, the validation of results and the creation of reports through dashboards in Looker Studio, including Panel 360. My work contributed significantly to the area and the organization by providing valuable information for decision making and improving operational efficiency.

Although I made significant progress, I faced challenges such as initial understanding of the loyalty program and errors in data validation. To minimize these errors in the future, measures such as more detailed training and stricter quality controls could be implemented. 9  4.

Personal Reflection During my time at CMR Puntos de Falabella Financiero, I experienced a journey of learning and growth that transcended mere job responsibilities. My contribution to the team was not only focused on executing tasks and delivering results, but also encompassed a profound process of self-discovery and personal development. On a professional level, every day represented a new and exciting challenge.

From mastering technical tools to understanding complex data systems, I was immersed in a constant learning environment. Each task performed, whether it was generating strategic indicators or validating results, provided me with the opportunity to hone my skills and expand my knowledge in key areas for data analysis and informed decision making. However, beyond the technical skills acquired, it was the interaction with my team and other departments that truly enriched my experience.

Close collaboration with experienced colleagues allowed me not only to absorb their knowledge and experience, but also to develop soft skills such as effective communication, time management and conflict resolution. These human interactions contributed greatly to my growth as a professional, allowing me to understand the importance of teamwork and synergy in a work environment.

On a more personal level, this experience challenged me to step out of my comfort zone and to embrace uncertainty with courage. I learned to face obstacles with determination and resilience, turning moments of adversity into opportunities for learning and growth. The ability to adapt to changing situations and maintain a positive mindset became an invaluable asset not only in the workplace, but also in my daily life.

Ultimately, my time at CMR Puntos was not only an opportunity to contribute to the success of the team and the organization, but also an experience of self-discovery and personal growth. I took with me not only technical skills and expertise, but also profound lessons on the importance of teamwork, resilience and continuous development. This internship has left an indelible mark on my professional and personal journey, preparing me for future challenges with confidence and determination. 10.
